property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Ghdl\Bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\CMake\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\\bin;C:\Users\anton\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\anton\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.3\bin;C:\Users\anton\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Users\anton\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;c:\Users\anton\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: testEnterTieBreak
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:87) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:53) at testcase.name: testMatchWin3_0
testcase.system-out:
*** SET 1 Vinto da P1 (6-0) ***
*** SET 2 Vinto da P1 (6-0) ***
*** SET 3 Vinto da P1 (6-0) ***
*** PARTITA VINTA DAL GIOCATORE 1! (3 Set a 0) ***
*** PARTITA VINTA DAL GIOCATORE 1! (3 Set a 0) ***

testcase.name: testMatchScoreInProgress

*** SET 1 Vinto da P1 (6-0) ***
*** SET 2 Vinto da P2 (6-0) ***
